name: The Powerhouse
summary: Explosive, short-burst athletes whose discipline rewards force production over duration.

name: The Distance Architect
summary: Aerobic specialists who excel at sustained effort across long durations.

name: The Marksman
summary: Calm under pressure, technique-driven, with elite fine motor control.

name: The Team Tactician
summary: Reads play, distributes effort, lifts the unit's ceiling.

name: The Aerial Artist
summary: Acrobatic specialists with extraordinary body awareness in the air.

name: The Field Force
summary: Throws and lifts athletes whose explosive output defines the discipline.

name: The Long Hauler
summary: Aerobic specialists who excel across distance disciplines.

name: The Steady Hand
summary: Composure and technique are the headline assets in these disciplines.

name: The Court General
summary: Court-vision athletes who orchestrate team flow.

name: The Form Stylist
summary: Body-awareness disciplines emphasizing technique and creative expression.
